verification_scope: Committed bundle bytes, current endpoint chain, and official CA-repository fingerprints
verification: The committed bundle parses as the WE1 intermediate followed by the self-signed GTS Root R4.
A live TLS check with SNI and system trust returned Verify return code 0 for api.anthropic.com on 2026-07-21 and presented a leaf issued by WE1.
The WE1 and GTS Root R4 fingerprints match the Google Trust Services repository at https://pki.goog/repository/.
limitations: The live endpoint check is a point-in-time observation, not proof of future routing or endpoint geography.
A matching fingerprint proves certificate bytes match the reviewed certificate. It does not by itself prove the original capture path.
A certificate subject country does not prove endpoint geography, processing location, or data residency.
